subject: [RFC PATCH 00/10] mm/swap: ghost swapfile with backend switching via Redirect entries

reviews.author: Baoquan He
reviews.summary: Raised concerns about the additional operational burden on users, especially under memory pressure. Questioned the need for a new data structure when an existing one (xarray) could be used.

reviews.author: Baoquan He
reviews.summary: Expressed strong disagreement with the proposed design, arguing it is more complicated and achieves less than a generic vswap device. Questioned the need for backend-specific code and additional state in the state machine.

2026-07-07.patch_summary: Proposal to introduce a 'ghost swapfile' with backend switching via Redirect entries, aiming to improve zswap performance and reduce overhead.
